parameters.formTitle: FarmGateIQ — Find Buyers for a Lot
parameters.formDescription: Enter the produce lot ID to score buyers and draft outreach for the top matches.

parameters.subject: ={{ 'FarmGateIQ — ' + $('Parse matches').all().length + ' buyer matches for lot ' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.id }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Buyer matches generated for lot ' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.id + ' (' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.commodity + ', ' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.quantity + ' ' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.unit + ' in ' + $('Select lot').all()[0].json.location + ')

' + '

Ranked matches:

    ' + $('Assemble approval row').all()[0].json.matches_html + '
' + '

Top-match outreach draft (pending your approval — nothing has been sent):

' + $('Assemble approval row').all()[0].json.original_content + '

' + '

Review the buyer_matches and approvals tabs in FarmGateIQ Demo before any outreach.

' }}
